pull_request.title: POL-1750 Python Updates
pull_request.body:
### Description

- Updates Python to `3.14.3` in GitHub Workflows.
- Adds ‎`.python-version` file to help users align their local environment to the repo
- Configures GitHub Workflows to reference above file instead of manually specifying Python version in each one.
- Adds Python-related stuff to `.gitignore` to ensure local files aren't added to a PR mistakenly
- Updates `Important Files Modified` Dangerfile test to not report files being added by the PR that don't yet exist.

       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: 3.13.2
+          python-version-file: '.python-version'
 
       - name: Install cfn-lint
         run: pip install cfn-lint

@@ -25,51 +25,59 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           fetch-depth: 100 # https://github.com/danger/danger/issues/913
+
       - name: Download fpt from GitHub releases
         uses: robinraju/release-downloader@v1
         with:
           repository: 'flexera-public/policy_sdk'
           fileName: 'fpt-linux-amd64-*.tgz'
           latest: true
+
       - name: Install fpt into PATH
         run: |
           tar -zxf fpt-linux-amd64-*.tgz
           sudo mv ./fpt/fpt /usr/local/bin/fpt
           sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/fpt
+
       - name: Cache node modules
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: node_modules
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}
           restore-keys: |
             ${{ runner.os }}-node-
+
       - name: Install node.js libraries
         shell: bash -l {0} # https://github.com/actions/virtual-environments/issues/4
         run: |
           nvm install
           nvm use
           npm install
+
       - name: Install Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: 3.13.2
-          cache: 'pip' # caching pip dependencies
-      - name: Install Python libraries
-        run: pip install -r requirements.txt
+          python-version-file: '.python-version'
+          cache: 'pip'
+          cache-dependency-path: 'requirements.txt'
+
       - name: Install Ruby
         uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
         with:
           # ruby-version: 2.4.1 # Not needed with a .ruby-version file
           bundler-cache: true # runs 'bundle install' and caches installed gems automatically
+
       - name: Install Ruby libraries
         shell: bash -l {0} # https://github.com/actions/virtual-environments/issues/4
         run: bundle install --without documentation --path bundle
       - name: Install Aspell
         run: |
           sudo apt-get update
           sudo apt-get install -y aspell
+
       - name: Generate policy API list
         run: python3 tools/policy_api_list_generation/policy_api_list_generator.py --output-dir /tmp
+
       - name: Run Tests
         shell: bash -l {0} # https://github.com/actions/virtual-environments/issues/4
         run: |

@@ -102,7 +102,7 @@ test = github_pr_missing_ready_label?(github); message test if test
 
 puts Time.now.strftime("%H:%M:%S.%L") + " * Testing if important files were modified..."
 
-modified_important_files = changed_dangerfiles + changed_dot_files + changed_config_files
+modified_important_files = (changed_dangerfiles + changed_dot_files + changed_config_files).select{ |file| git.modified_files.include?(file) }
 modified_important_files = modified_important_files.join("\n")
 
 # Consolidate changed files into a single warning to save space
